mapper.select: SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_nm /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.partner.mapper.IPartnerMapper.selectAptCmplexNmByMgmtOfcNo*/ FROM mgmt_office mo JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = mo.apt_cmplex_no WHERE mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo}

SELECT rn /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.partner.mapper.IPartnerMapper.selectPartnerList*/ ,partner_no ,apt_cmplex_no ,apt_cmplex_nm ,biz_ty_nm ,partner_nm ,bizrno ,use_yn ,pic_nm ,pic_telno ,pic_email ,reg_dt ,mdf_dt ,contract_cnt ,active_contract_cnt ,check_cnt ,recent_check_dt ,utility_provider_no ,meter_linked_yn ,meter_cnt ,complex_meter_cnt ,facility_meter_cnt ,recent_meter_dt ,recent_complex_meter_dt ,recent_facility_meter_dt FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY p.reg_dt DESC NULLS LAST, p.partner_no DESC) AS rn ,p.partner_no ,p.apt_cmplex_no ,ac.apt_cmplex_nm ,p.biz_ty_nm ,p.partner_nm ,p.bizrno ,p.use_yn ,p.pic_nm ,p.pic_telno ,p.pic_email ,TO_CHAR(p.reg_dt, 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS reg_dt ,TO_CHAR(p.mdf_dt, 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS mdf_dt ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility_contract fc WHERE fc.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS contract_cnt ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility_contract fc WHERE fc.partner_no = p.partner_no AND fc.cont_stts_cd = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_contract_cnt ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility_check_hstry fch WHERE fch.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS check_cnt ,( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(fch.chk_dt), 'yyyy/mm/dd') FROM facility_check_hstry fch WHERE fch.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS recent_check_dt ,( SELECT MIN(up.utility_provider_no) FROM utility_provider up WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS utility_provider_no ,CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM utility_provider up WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS meter_linked_yn ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS meter_cnt ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no AND mh.meter_scope = 'COMPLEX' ) AS complex_meter_cnt ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no AND mh.meter_scope = 'FACILITY' ) AS facility_meter_cnt ,( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(mh.meter_dt), 'yyyy/mm/dd') FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no ) AS recent_meter_dt ,( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(mh.meter_dt), 'yyyy/mm/dd') FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no AND mh.meter_scope = 'COMPLEX' ) AS recent_complex_meter_dt ,( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(mh.meter_dt), 'yyyy/mm/dd') FROM utility_provider up JOIN meter_hstry mh ON mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no AND mh.meter_scope = 'FACILITY' ) AS recent_facility_meter_dt FROM partner p LEFT JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = p.apt_cmplex_no
) partner_list WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.partner.mapper.IPartnerMapper.selectPartnerStat*/ ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN p.use_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS active_cnt ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_contract fc WHERE fc.partner_no = p.partner_no ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS contract_linked_cnt ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM utility_provider up WHERE up.partner_no = p.partner_no ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS meter_linked_cnt FROM partner p WHERE p.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT DISTINCT p.biz_ty_nm /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.partner.mapper.IPartnerMapper.selectBizTypeList*/ FROM partner p WHERE p.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND p.biz_ty_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.biz_ty_nm
